blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this learning path! Job well done!

You've accomplished the following:

- Learned how Grafana Cloud eliminates the operational burden of a self-hosted observability stack.
- Explored the differences between data sent to Grafana Cloud and data connected from external sources.
- Reviewed the core platform components.
- Explored the options for dashboards to visualize and query data.

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this path.

- [Get started with Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/grafana-cloud-onboarding/)
- [Visualize metrics in a Grafana Cloud dashboard](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/visualization-metrics/)
